name: @quoin/tokens-mui
description: Material UI (MUI) default theme translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: MUI v6 default light theme. MUI's classic primary is indigo (#1976d2), secondary is pink. Distinct from Material 3 — MUI is the React port of an older Material 2/3 hybrid; many MUI projects still ship the classic palette.
